title: Session-based WSSV comparison case study
summary: Load the bundled session first to inspect a White spot syndrome virus reference and 20 prepared BLAST/LOSAT comparison rings. The displayed prepared-input command documents provenance; it is not a directly runnable public recipe.
primaryWorkflow: Circular nucleotide-similarity rings with LOSAT blastn
requirements: Start by loading the bundled Gallery session. A manual rebuild requires all 20 prepared comparison assemblies, and several are available only inside that session.

downloads.label: Bundled Gallery session
downloads.note: This is the primary path: load the session to inspect the completed result, settings, prepared inputs, and cached LOSAT output without rebuilding the external dataset.

downloads.label: AP027280
downloads.note: Download the JP02 White spot syndrome virus record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.label: CN01
downloads.note: Download the complete genome as FASTA and save it with this filename.

manualSteps.title: Load the bundled session first
manualSteps.body: Open gbdraw.app, choose Load Settings / Session, and load WSSV_genome_comparison.gbdraw-session.json from Files. Inspect the restored result and settings before deciding whether the external input preparation is necessary for your work.

operations.body: Use the restored session as the complete inspection path; the following steps document the optional prepared-input rebuild.

media.alt: Completed WSSV circular comparison restored from the bundled Gallery session.
media.caption: The bundled session restores the completed 20-ring comparison without requiring the external preparation workflow.

manualSteps.title: Optional rebuild: switch to Circular mode
manualSteps.body: For a manual rebuild with prepared inputs, open gbdraw.app and select Circular mode before adding the WSSV reference record.

manualSteps.title: Upload the reference GenBank file
manualSteps.body: Upload AP027280.gb as the circular reference. This record is the JP02 White spot syndrome virus genome shown at the center of the Gallery figure.

rows: CDS, rRNA, tRNA, tmRNA, ncRNA, repeat_region

media.alt: Circular GenBank uploader with the AP027280.gb file chip.
media.caption: Upload AP027280.gb in the Circular GenBank uploader.

manualSteps.title: Set the basic circular layout
manualSteps.body: Use a spread-out circular track so the outer CDS features remain readable around the similarity rings.

operations.title: Track preset selector
operations.body: Open Track Preset and choose Spreadout.

media.alt: Layout card with the Track Preset menu open and the Spreadout option highlighted.
media.caption: Open Track Preset in the Layout card and choose the highlighted Spreadout option.

operations.title: Legend position selector
operations.body: Open Legend Position and choose Left.

media.alt: Title and Legend card with the Legend Position menu open and the Left option highlighted.
media.caption: Open Legend Position in the Title & Legend card and choose the highlighted Left option.

manualSteps.title: Configure Pairwise Comparisons
manualSteps.body: Open Pairwise Comparisons, select Run LOSAT and LOSATN, and use the circular comparison settings below.

operations.title: Pairwise Comparisons panel
operations.body: Open Pairwise Comparisons and choose Run LOSAT with LOSATN.

media.alt: Pairwise Comparisons panel open with Run LOSAT, LOSATN, thresholds, and comparison FASTA controls.
media.caption: Open Pairwise Comparisons and choose Run LOSAT with LOSATN.

manualSteps.title: Add, name, and color the comparison series
manualSteps.body: Add the 20 FASTA files in this order, then set each row label and color so the rings and left legend follow the documented order.

media.alt: First four Comparison FASTA series rows with labels, color swatches, and order controls.
media.caption: Use the compact series list to check labels, colors, and order; enter all 20 rows from the table.

actions.script: () => { const series = window.__GBDRAW_APP__?.circularConservation?.series; return Array.isArray(series) && series.length === 20 && series[0]?.label === 'CN01' && series[19]?.label === 'Angostura2013'; }

const heading = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('label')).find((node) => node.textContent.includes('Comparison FASTA files')); const container = heading?.parentElement; const rows = Array.from(container?.children || []).filter((node) => node.querySelector?.('input[type="color"]')).slice(0, 4); if (!heading || rows.length !== 4) throw new Error('Representative comparison rows not found.'); heading.dataset.capture = 'comparison-series-heading'; rows.forEach((row, index) => { row.dataset.capture = `comparison-series-row-${index + 1}`; });

manualSteps.title: Set search thresholds
manualSteps.body: Set the blastn filters so each ring shows HSPs with a bit score of at least 100, an E-value of at most 1e-30, at least 90% identity, and an alignment length of at least 100 nt.

media.alt: LOSAT Settings thresholds with bit score 100, E-value 1e-30, identity 90, and minimum length 100.
media.caption: Set the bit score to 100, E-value to 1e-30, identity to 90, and minimum length to 100.

manualSteps.title: Generate the diagram
manualSteps.body: Click Generate Diagram. The preview should show the AP027280 feature ring, 20 nucleotide-similarity rings, the position scale, and a left legend with an identity gradient for each comparison genome.

media.alt: Generated WSSV comparison diagram with 20 nucleotide-similarity rings and the left identity legend.
media.caption: The generated preview stacks 20 nucleotide-similarity hit rings inside the reference CDS feature ring.

manualSteps.title: Inspect a CDS feature
manualSteps.body: Click an outer CDS feature in the interactive SVG and open Details to inspect its label, record ID, feature type, location, and protein ID.

operations.title: Zoom before clicking
operations.body: This SVG is dense. Zoom or pan the preview before clicking a small outer CDS feature.

media.alt: WSSV web app floating preview controls with Reset Layout, Layout edit, Canvas padding, and zoom buttons visible.
media.caption: Use the floating preview toolbar to zoom or pan before selecting a small CDS.

media.alt: Zoomed WSSV comparison crop with the clicked outer CDS, nucleotide-similarity rings, and Details metadata.
media.caption: The Details tab shows the VP180 label, AP027280.1 record, CDS type, location, and BDX26618.1 protein ID.

actions.script: document.querySelector('.preview-feature-search')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app) { app.resultPanelTab = 'preview'; app.zoom = 1.25; if (app.svgContainer) app.svgContainer.style.transform = 'translate(-80px, -40px) scale(1.25)'; }

() => { const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; const feature = app?.extractedFeatures?.find((entry) => entry.svg_id === 'f6e93b594'); return Boolean(app?.results?.[0]?.content?.includes("data-gbdraw-feature-id=\"f6e93b594\"") && feature?.note === 'wsv001' && feature?.product === 'collagen-like protein VP180' && feature?.protein_id === 'BDX26618.1'); }
const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app?.clickedFeature) app.clickedFeature.activeTab = 'details'; if (app?.clickedFeaturePos) { app.clickedFeaturePos.x = 40; app.clickedFeaturePos.y = 360; }

() => { const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; const text = document.querySelector('.feature-popup')?.textContent || ''; return app?.clickedFeature?.activeTab === 'details' && text.includes('collagen-like protein VP180') && text.includes('AP027280.1') && text.includes('CDS') && text.includes('BDX26618.1'); }

losatTips.title: Use blastn megablast for close viral genomes
losatTips.body: These WSSV genomes are compared at the nucleotide level. The tutorial uses the megablast task for the closely related sequences.

losatTips.title: Reuse the cache
losatTips.body: The app reuses LOSAT results when the input files and LOSAT settings have not changed, so styling edits avoid another search.

troubleshooting.title: Similarity rings are missing
troubleshooting.body: Check that Pairwise Comparisons uses Run LOSAT, the comparison FASTA files are uploaded, and the generated result is the circular output.

troubleshooting.title: A ring appears in the wrong order
troubleshooting.body: Check the FASTA upload order, ring labels, and ring colors. The legend follows the comparison FASTA upload order.

troubleshooting.title: The rings look too sparse
troubleshooting.body: The Gallery figure uses the thresholds listed above. Lower the identity or alignment-length cutoff only when you want to retain more weak or short HSPs.

troubleshooting.title: The browser becomes slow
troubleshooting.body: Use the bundled Gallery session for inspection, close other heavy tabs, or temporarily use fewer comparison FASTA files while tuning the layout.

troubleshooting.title: The generated diagram differs from the Gallery image
troubleshooting.body: Check AP027280.gb, Track Preset Spreadout, Separate Strands, Hide GC Content, Hide GC Skew, Label Mode None, Legend Position Left, Ring Width, Ring Gap, thresholds, colors, and comparison FASTA order.
